zh.lifeSummary: 當Lucia Moyle於1450年5月10日出生在英國肯特坎特布瑞時，她的父親Sir Walter Moyle47歲，母親Lady Margaret Lucombe of Stevenstone45歲。她於1470年與Sir John Forde Clarke III在英國英格蘭肯特萊坦結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1494年1月20日在英國肯特萊坦享年43歲，埋葬在英國肯特萊坦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lucia Moyle于1450年5月10日出生在英国肯特坎特布瑞时，她的父亲Sir Walter Moyle47岁，母亲Lady Margaret Lucombe of Stevenstone45岁。她于1470年与Sir John Forde Clarke III在英国英格兰肯特萊坦结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1494年1月20日在英国肯特萊坦享年43岁，埋葬在英国肯特萊坦。

nameMeanings.name: Moyle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cornish: probably a nickname from Middle Cornish mōl ‘bald’, though its development to Moyl(e) is irregular.
Welsh: nickname from moel ‘bare, bald’, equivalent to Middle Cornish mōl (see 1 above).
English: variant of   Mule   or   Moule  .

variants.name: Mule
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Vito, Angelo, Antonio, Matteo, Sal, Carmelo, Concetta, Francesco, Gaetano, Gaspare, Gino, Rosario.
English: nickname, perhaps for a stubborn person, from Middle English mule, muel, meul, moile ‘mule’ (Old French mule). See also Moyle and Moule , with which this name may have been interchangeable.

variants.name: Milne
meanings: Scottish (mainly Aberdeenshire and Angus): occupational name from Middle English milne ‘mill’, also found as mulne in south and western England and melne in southeastern England. The Scottish name has been established in Ireland since the early 18th century, and has absorbed some cases of Irish Moyle . Compare Mill 1.

variants.name: Moyles
meanings: English: variant of Moyle , with post-medieval excrescent -s.
English: in Devon and Cornwall probably a variant of   Mullis  .
Irish (Mayo and Meath): variant of   Miles  .

nameMeanings.name: Lucia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Feminine form of the old Roman given name Lucius, which is probably a derivative of Latin lux ‘light’. The girl's name is common in Italy and elsewhere, and is found as a learned, Latinate doublet of Lucy in England. St Lucia of Syracuse, who was martyred in 304 , was a very popular saint in the Middle Ages; she is often represented in medieval art as blinded and with her eyes on a platter, but the tradition that she had her eyes put out is probably based on nothing more than the association between light and eyes.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Lucia Moyle was born on 10 May 1450, in Canterbury, Kent, England, her father, Sir Walter Moyle, was 47 and her mother, Lady Margaret Lucombe of Stevenstone, was 45. She married Sir John Forde Clarke III in 1470, in Wrotham, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 20 January 1494, in Wrotham, Kent, England, at the age of 43, and was buried in Wrotham, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lucia Moyle est née le 10 mai 1450, à Canterbury, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Sir Walter Moyle, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret Lucombe of Stevenstone, avait 45 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Forde Clarke III en 1470, à Wrotham, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 20 janvier 1494, à Wrotham, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 43 ans, et a été enterrée à Wrotham, Kent, Angleterre.

Sie hat 1470 in Wrotham, Kent, England, United Kingdom Sir John Forde Clarke III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 20. Januar 1494 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Wrotham, Kent, England und wurde in Wrotham, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lucia Moyle è nata il il 10 maggio 1450 nel Canterbury, Kent, England, sua padre, Sir Walter Moyle, aveva 47 anni e sua madre, Lady Margaret Lucombe of Stevenstone, aveva 45 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Forde Clarke III nel 1470, nel Wrotham, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 20 gennaio 1494, nel Wrotham, Kent, England, all'età di 43 anni, e fu sepolta a Wrotham, Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lucia Moyleが1450年5月10日にイギリスケントカンテルブリーで生まれた時，父Sir Walter Moyleは47歳，母Lady Margaret Lucombe of Stevenstoneは45歳であった。1470年にイギリスイギリスケントウロサムでSir John Forde Clarke IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1494年1月20日にイギリスケントウロサムで43歳で死去し，イギリスケントウロサムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lucia Moyle(이)가 1450년 5월 10일 영국 켄트 캉르버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Walter Moyle(은)는 47세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Margaret Lucombe of Stevenstone(은)는 45세였다. 그녀는 1470년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 로섬에서 Sir John Forde Clarke III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1494년 1월 20일 영국 켄트 로섬에서 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 로섬에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lucia Moyle nasceu em 10 de maio de 1450, em Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Walter Moyle, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margaret Lucombe of Stevenstone, tinha 45 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Forde Clarke III em 1470, em Wrotham, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 20 de janeiro de 1494, em Wrotham, Kent, Inglaterra, com 43 anos, e foi sepultada em Wrotham, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lucia Moyle родилась 10 мая 1450 г. в местности кантирбури, кэнт, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Walter Moyle было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret Lucombe of Stevenstone, 45. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Forde Clarke III в 1470 г. в местности ротам, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 20 января 1494 г. в местности ротам, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 43 лет и была похоронена в местности ротам, кэнт, Англия.
